request.description: Register a new user account.
Step 2: Verify registration OTP to complete user creation. Returns user data with access and refresh tokens.
Step 1: Validate credentials. Returns tokens directly if verified, otherwise sends login OTP.
Step 2: Verify OTP to activate account or complete login and receive tokens.
Resend OTP. For email verification, pass the user's email address â€” no prior pending OTP needed if email is unverified.
Verify the user's email address using the OTP received via email. Call Resend OTP first to trigger sending the email_verification OTP.
Verify the user's phone number using the OTP received via SMS. Call Resend OTP first to trigger sending the phone_verification OTP if needed.
Create a new user. Role 1 is Admin, Role 2 is View-Only.
Upload an image file. Field name must be 'file'.
Delete a media file and its database record.
Submit a new travel permit application.
Fetch all applications (supports filtering).
Generate and download the PDF certificate for an approved application.
Download the PDF certificate for an approved application using the new dedicated download endpoint.
Get travel history for the currently logged-in user.
Get application statistics for the currently logged-in user.
Get dashboard data for the currently logged-in user.
Verify an application's permit using the Base64 QR token. Requires applications.update permission.
Public endpoint. Get a setting value by its key. No auth required.
Public endpoint. Get only the raw string value of a setting. Useful for direct URLs or text content.
Create or update a setting by key. If the key already exists, its value will be updated. Types: image, content, text, url.
Initiate a bKash payment. Redirects to bKash payment page.
bKash callback endpoint. Handles payment success/fail/cancel status.
Initiate a Shurjopay payment. Redirects to Shurjopay checkout URL.
Shurjopay callback endpoint. Validates payment via order_id.
List all destinations.
List only active destinations.
Create a new destination (Admin only).
Get details of a single destination.
Update destination details or toggle active status.
Remove a destination from the system.
